title: Tile containing primer coated substrates with good adhesion
abstract: A tile comprising the following components: A) a first film formed from a first composition comprising the following: i) a functionalized olefin-based polymer comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: a) a carboxylic acid, and/or b) an anhydride, and, optionally, c) an amino or an amine; and ii) a functionalized styrenic block copolymer, comprising, in polymerized form, styrene, and ethylene and/or at least one alpha-olefin, and comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: a) a carboxylic acid, and/or b) an anhydride; and B) a substrate comprising at least one layer formed from a second composition comprising a propylene-based polymer; and wherein the first film covers at least one surface of the substrate.
claims: Claims We claim: 1. A tile comprising the following components: A) a first film formed from a first composition comprising the following: i) a functionalized olefin-based polymer comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: a) a carboxylic acid, and/or b) an anhydride, and, optionally, c) an amino or an amine; and ii) a functionalized styrenic block copolymer, comprising, in polymerized form, styrene, and ethylene and/or at least one alpha-olefin, and comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: a) a carboxylic acid, and/or b) an anhydride; and B) a substrate comprising at least one layer formed from a second composition comprising a propyl ene-based polymer; and wherein the first film covers at least one surface of the substrate. 2. The tile of Claim 1, further comprising: C) a UV-curable urethane-acrylate top coat layer applied onto and in contact with the first film. 3. The tile of Claim 1 or Claim 2, wherein the functionalized olefin-based polymer is a functionalized ethylene-based polymer. 4. The tile of any one of the previous claims, wherein the functionalized olefin-based polymer is a functionalized ethylene/a-olefin interpolymer, selected from the group consisting of the following: an anhydride-functionalized ethylene/a-olefin interpolymer, a carboxylic-acid-functionalized ethylene/a-olefin copolymer, an hydroxy-functionalized ethylene/a-olefin copolymer, an amine-functionalized ethylene/a-olefin copolymer, and a combination thereof. 5. The tile of any one of the previous claims, wherein the functionalized styrenic block copolymer is selected from the group consisting of the following: an anhydride- functionalized styrenic block copolymer, a carboxylic-acid-functionalized styrenic block copolymer, an hydroxy-functionalized styrenic block copolymer, an amine-functionalized styrenic block copolymer, and a combination thereof. 6. The tile of any one of the previous claims , wherein the weight ratio of the functionalized olefin-based polymer to the functionalized styrenic block copolymer is from 2.0/1.0 to 6.0/1.0. 7. The tile of any one of the previous claims, wherein the first composition comprises less than 0.001 wt% of an isocyanate compound, based on the weight of the first composition. 8. The tile of any one of the previous claims, wherein the first composition is halogen free. 9. An article comprising the tile of any one of the previous claims. 10. A primer composition comprising the following components: a) a functionalized olefin-based polymer comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: i) a carboxylic acid, and/or ii) an anhydride, and, optionally, iii) an amino or an amine; and b) a functionalized styrenic block copolymer, comprising, in polymerized form, styrene, and ethylene and/or at least one alpha-olefin, and comprising one or more chemical groups selected from the following: i) a carboxylic acid, and/or ii) an anhydride; and wherein the primer composition comprises less than 0.001 wt% of an isocyanate, based on the weight of the primer composition. 11. The primer composition of Claim 10, wherein the composition does not comprise an isocyanate compound. 12. The primer composition of Claim 10 or Claim 11, wherein the composition is halogen free. 13. The primer composition of any one of Claims 10-12, wherein the functionalized olefin-based polymer a maleic anhydride (MAH) functionalized ethylene-based polymer; and the functionalized styrenic block copolymer is a maleic anhydride (MAH) functionalized styrenic block copolymer. 14. The primer composition of any one of Claims 10-13, wherein the first composition further comprises a solvent composition comprising at least one hydrocarbon solvent. 15. An article comprising at least one component formed from the primer composition of any one of Claims 10-14.
